instagram.label: Instagram
instagram.description: Instagram image sizes for posts, stories, profiles, and reels. Square posts are 1080x1080, portrait is 1080x1350, landscape is 1080x566.

facebook.label: Facebook
facebook.description: Facebook image sizes for posts, profiles, covers, and stories. Cover photos are 851x315, shared posts work best at 1200x630.

twitter.label: X (Twitter)
twitter.description: X (Twitter) image sizes for profile photos, header images, and in-stream posts. Headers display at 1500x500 on desktop.

linkedin.label: LinkedIn
linkedin.description: LinkedIn image sizes for profiles, posts, company pages, and cover images. Banner display is 1128x191, shared images are 1200x627.

tiktok.label: TikTok
tiktok.description: TikTok image sizes for profile pictures, videos, and ads. The platform uses 9:16 portrait (1080x1920) as the primary format for all video content.

youtube.label: YouTube
youtube.description: YouTube image sizes for thumbnails, channel art, and profile photos. Video thumbnails are 1280x720, channel art banners are 2560x1440.

pinterest.label: Pinterest
pinterest.description: Pinterest image sizes for pins, profile photos, and board covers. Standard pins use the tall 2:3 aspect ratio at 1000x1500 pixels.

snapchat.label: Snapchat
snapchat.description: Snapchat image sizes for snaps, stories, geofilters, and ads. All full-screen Snapchat content uses 1080x1920 in 9:16 portrait orientation.

whatsapp.label: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: WhatsApp image sizes for profile pictures, status updates, and business profiles. Status images display full-screen at 1080x1920.

twitch.label: Twitch
twitch.description: Twitch image sizes for profile pictures, banners, panels, and offline screens. Panels are small 320x160 informational boxes below streams.

reddit.label: Reddit
reddit.description: Reddit image sizes for profile pictures, banners, and post images. Reddit banners are extremely wide at 4000x128 pixels.

telegram.label: Telegram
telegram.description: Telegram image sizes for profile pictures and channel covers. Profile photos display in circular crops, so centering the subject matters.

discord.label: Discord
discord.description: Discord image sizes for avatars, server icons, banners, and splash screens. Server banners display at 960x540 on the channel list header.
